attributes.Sql Query:
--SQL Query : 
-- not in subline inclusion and not in cx and go with line id join to regular overlay crediting table
SELECT
  BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT 
 ,BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 ,AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   
 ,BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 ,MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   
 ,OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER      
 ,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE    
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6))DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT 
 ,CAST(COALESCE(DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY    
 ,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
 ,OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT      
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
 ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
 ,LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
 ,'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
 ,'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLG
 ,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
 ,PROCESS_DATE_RK,
 '=' AS PD_ADJSTMNT_RPTNG_TYPE_CD,
CAST(COALESCE(SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT, 0) AS DECIMAL(26,7))SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,CAST(COALESCE(DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,CAST(COALESCE(DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT , 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
,SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM
 ( 
 
  --1. top line, not in subline inclusion and not in cx and not exists in line creation date between effective start date and effective end date

 SELECT 
  NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
 ,NBMFOD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,NBMFOD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,NBMFOD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
 ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
 ,NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
 ,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
 ,NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,NBMFOD.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
 ,NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
 ,  CASE 
 WHEN NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG='F' AND NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK=1 THEN 'Y' 
 ELSE 'N'
 END  AS LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
 ,NBMFOD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
 ,NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
,CAST(-9999 AS BIGINT ) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50))RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DIRECT_DATA_ERP_INCR NBMFOD
 INNER JOIN ( SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,CAST(BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS DATE FORMAT'yyyy-mm-dd') as LINE_CREATION_DATE FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE GROUP BY 1,2) NSOL
 ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN 
 ( SELECT  
   PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , 
   PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT,
   PD_SALES_REP_NUM, 
   PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
   BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD, 
   PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
   PD_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD AS PD_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD
   FROM 
   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_APLD_TRX_OVERLAY
   WHERE PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD IN ('R','CR')  
   AND BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD NOT IN( 'CX')
 --  AND BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN (SELECT BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OVERLAY_SUB_LINE_INCLUSION GROUP BY 1)  
   ) NAOVRLY
 ON NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 WHERE  NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OVERLAY_SUB_LINE_INCLUSION EL WHERE NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = EL.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD 
   AND NSOL.LINE_CREATION_DATE 	BETWEEN EL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND EL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE) 
 
 UNION ALL

--2.  in cx and line creation date >= fiscal year start date
SELECT 
  NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
 ,NBMFOD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,NBMFOD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,NBMFOD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
 ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
 ,NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
 ,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
 ,NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,NBMFOD.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
 ,NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
 ,  CASE 
 WHEN NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG='F' AND NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK=1 THEN 'Y' 
 ELSE 'N'
 END  AS LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
 ,NBMFOD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
 ,NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
,NBMFOD.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,RTNR.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DIRECT_DATA_ERP_INCR NBMFOD
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION RTNR
 ON NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = RTNR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NBMFOD.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = RTNR.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 AND NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY = RTNR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 AND RTNR.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND RTNR.SALES_MOTION_CD = 'RENEW'
 AND RTNR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP'
 INNER JOIN ( SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,CAST(BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS DATE  FORMAT 'yyyy-mm-dd') as LINE_CREATION_DATE FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE GROUP BY 1,2) NSOL
 ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN 
	  ( SELECT  *     
		FROM 
		$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_APLD_TRX_OLY_RTNR
		WHERE PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD IN ('R','CR')  
		AND BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('CX')
		) NAOVRLY
  ON NAOVRLY.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID = RTNR.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID 
  
 WHERE NSOL.LINE_CREATION_DATE >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_FY22_START_DATE' AND TABLE_NAME = 'FY22_START_DATE')
 
 UNION ALL
 
 --3. in cx and line creation date < fiscal year start date
 
 SELECT 
  NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
 ,NBMFOD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,NBMFOD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,NBMFOD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
 ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
 ,NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
 ,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
 ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
 ,NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,NBMFOD.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
 ,NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
 ,  CASE 
 WHEN NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG='F' AND NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK=1 THEN 'Y' 
 ELSE 'N'
 END  AS LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
 ,NBMFOD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
 ,NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*SMC.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
,NBMFOD.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50))RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DIRECT_DATA_ERP_INCR NBMFOD
  INNER JOIN ( SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,CAST(BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS DATE  FORMAT 'yyyy-mm-dd') as LINE_CREATION_DATE FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE GROUP BY 1,2) NSOL
 ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT  
   PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , 
   PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT,
   PD_SALES_REP_NUM, 
   PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
   BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD, 
      SUM(TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT) OVER (PARTITION BY PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD) SUMS_LINE,
 CASE WHEN SUMS_LINE <>0 THEN (TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT/SUMS_LINE)*100 ELSE 0 END RATIO ,
   CASE WHEN OFFER_ATTRBTN_ID_INT<0 THEN RATIO
 ELSE PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT END AS PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
   PD_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD AS PD_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
   OFFER_ATTRBTN_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
   FROM   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_APLD_TRX_OLY_RTNR
   WHERE PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD IN ('R','CR')  
   AND BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN ('CX')
   ) NAOVRLY
 ON NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 AND NAOVRLY.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  =NBMFOD.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKG_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION SMC
ON NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY = SMC.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY    
AND  SMC.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND SMC.SALES_MOTION_CD IN ('RENEW')
AND SMC.DV_TRX_TYPE = 'ERP'
WHERE NSOL.LINE_CREATION_DATE < (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_FY22_START_DATE' AND TABLE_NAME = 'FY22_START_DATE') 

UNION ALL

--4. not in cx and exists in subline inclusion and line creation date >= fiscal start date
 SELECT 
   NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
  ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
  ,NBMFOD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
  ,NBMFOD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,NBMFOD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
  ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
  ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
  ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
  ,NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
  ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
  ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
  ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
  ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
  ,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
  ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
  ,NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  ,NBMFOD.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
  ,NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
  ,  CASE 
  WHEN NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG='F' AND NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK=1 THEN 'Y' 
  ELSE 'N'
  END  AS LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
  ,NBMFOD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
  ,NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT 
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/(100*100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,CAST(-9999 AS BIGINT ) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,RTNR.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
 ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_DIRECT_DATA_ERP_INCR NBMFOD
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION RTNR
 ON NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = RTNR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NBMFOD.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = RTNR.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 AND NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY = RTNR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 AND RTNR.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND RTNR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP'
 INNER JOIN ( SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,CAST(BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS DATE  FORMAT 'yyyy-mm-dd') as LINE_CREATION_DATE FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE GROUP BY 1,2) NSOL
 ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

INNER JOIN 
	  ( SELECT  *     
		FROM 
		$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_APLD_TRX_OLY_RTNR
		WHERE PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD IN ('R','CR')  
		AND BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('CX')
	   AND BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN (SELECT BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OVERLAY_SUB_LINE_INCLUSION GROUP BY 1) 
		) NAOVRLY
  ON NAOVRLY.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID = RTNR.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID 
  
 AND EXISTS   (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OVERLAY_SUB_LINE_INCLUSION EL
    WHERE NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = EL.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
	AND NSOL.LINE_CREATION_DATE BETWEEN EL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND EL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE)
 AND NSOL.LINE_CREATION_DATE >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_FY22_START_DATE' AND TABLE_NAME = 'FY22_START_DATE')
 
 
 UNION ALL
 
 ---5. not in cx and exists in subline inclusion and line creation date < fiscal year start date

SELECT 
   NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
  ,NAOVRLY.PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT AS  OVERLAY_SALES_CREATION_DT            
  ,NBMFOD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
  ,NBMFOD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  ,NBMFOD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT        
  ,-999 AS MANUAL_TRX_KEY                
  ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS OVERLAY_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY     
  ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_REP_NUM AS OVERLAY_SALES_REP_NUMBER       
  ,NBMFOD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE  
  ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6))  AS  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
  ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
  ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
  ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
  ,NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
  ,NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS OVERLAY_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
  ,NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  ,NBMFOD.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY  
  ,NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
  ,  CASE 
  WHEN NBMFOD.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG='F' AND NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK=1 THEN 'Y' 
  ELSE 'N'
  END  AS LATEST_DR_BKGS_FLG
  ,NBMFOD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
  ,NBMFOD.PROCESS_DATE_RK
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS  SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT)/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
 ,CAST((NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT*NBMFOD.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT )/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS  DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
 ,CAST(-9999 AS BIGINT ) AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,NBMFOD.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
 ,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50))RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
 ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_DIRECT_DATA_ERP_INCR NBMFOD
  INNER JOIN ( SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,CAST(BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS DATE  FORMAT 'yyyy-mm-dd') as LINE_CREATION_DATE FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE GROUP BY 1,2) NSOL
  ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN 
  (SELECT  
   PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , 
   PD_SCAA_CREATION_DT,
   PD_SALES_REP_NUM, 
   PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
   BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD, 
   --PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
      SUM(TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT) OVER (PARTITION BY PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD) SUMS_LINE,
   CASE WHEN SUMS_LINE <>0 THEN (TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT/SUMS_LINE)*100 ELSE 0 END RATIO ,
   CASE WHEN OFFER_ATTRBTN_ID_INT<0 THEN RATIO
 ELSE PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT END AS PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
   PD_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD AS PD_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
   OFFER_ATTRBTN_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
   FROM    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SCA_APLD_TRX_OLY_RTNR 
   WHERE PD_SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD IN ('R','CR')  
    AND BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('CX')
   AND BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD IN (SELECT BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OVERLAY_SUB_LINE_INCLUSION GROUP BY 1)
    ) NAOVRLY
  ON NAOVRLY.PD_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBMFOD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
  WHERE EXISTS   (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OVERLAY_SUB_LINE_INCLUSION EL WHERE EL.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = NAOVRLY.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
	AND NSOL.LINE_CREATION_DATE BETWEEN EL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND EL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE)
	AND NSOL.LINE_CREATION_DATE < (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_FY22_START_DATE' AND TABLE_NAME = 'FY22_START_DATE')   ) A
